en: Artificial intelligence is transforming the way we live and work.
zh: 人工智能正在改变我们生活和工作的模式。

en: Machine learning models require large amounts of training data.
zh: 机器学习模型需要大量的训练数据。

en: Natural language processing enables computers to understand human language.
zh: 自然语言处理使计算机能够理解人类语言。

en: The sun set behind the mountains painting the sky in shades of orange and red.
zh: 夕阳西下山峦之后将天空染成橙红色。

en: She walked along the riverbank enjoying the cool breeze.
zh: 她沿着河岸漫步享受着凉爽的微风。

en: Deep learning has achieved remarkable results in image recognition tasks.
zh: 深度学习在图像识别任务中取得了显著成果。

en: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
zh: 那只敏捷的棕色狐狸跳过了那只懒狗。

en: Scientists are developing new methods to combat climate change.
zh: 科学家们正在开发应对气候变化的新方法。

en: Neural networks are inspired by the structure of the human brain.
zh: 神经网络的灵感来源于人类大脑的结构。

en: The translation model uses retrieval augmented generation to improve accuracy.
zh: 翻译模型使用检索增强生成技术来提高准确性。

en: The Demand Side Platform allows advertisers to manage multiple Ad Exchange accounts.
zh: 需求方平台允许广告主管理多个广告交易平台账号。

en: Real-Time Bidding has revolutionized how we purchase Ad Inventory.
zh: 实时竞价彻底改变了我们购买广告库存的方式。

en: We need to optimize our Click-Through Rate to lower the total Cost Per Click.
zh: 我们需要优化点击率以降低总每次点击成本。

en: A high Cost Per Mille does not always guarantee high Viewability.
zh: 高每千次展示成本并不总是能保证高可见性。

en: The Agency Trading Desk manages programmatic buys across various Ad Networks.
zh: 代理商通用平台管理不同广告网络的程序化购买。

en: Attribution Modeling helps us understand the true value of each touchpoint.
zh: 归因模型帮助我们了解每个触点的真实价值。

en: Auction Dynamics determine the final price paid for each of the Impressions.
zh: 竞价机制决定了每条广告曝光所支付的最终价格。

en: Our main goal for this campaign is to increase Brand Awareness among Gen Z.
zh: 我们此次活动的主要目标是提高 Z 世代的品牌知名度。

en: Customer Acquisition Cost has increased due to high competition in the market.
zh: 由于市场竞争激烈，客户获取成本有所上升。

en: The Data Management Platform aggregates First-Party Data for better targeting.
zh: 数据管理平台汇总第一方数据以实现更好的精准投放。

en: Direct to Consumer brands often rely heavily on Private Traffic.
zh: 直面消费者品牌通常严重依赖私域流量。

en: Dynamic Creative Optimization adjusts the ad content based on user behavior.
zh: 动态创意优化根据用户行为调整广告内容。

en: Header Bidding allows publishers to offer inventory to multiple SSPs simultaneously.
zh: 头部竞价允许媒体方同时向多个供应方平台提供库存。

en: Key Opinion Consumers provide more authentic reviews than traditional celebrities.
zh: 关键意见消费者提供比传统名人更真实的评价。

en: The Key Opinion Leader shared the product link with their followers.
zh: 关键意见领袖与他们的粉丝分享了产品链接。

en: Many content creators are managed by a Multi-Channel Network.
zh: 许多内容创作者由多频道网络管理。

en: Native Advertising blends in with the editorial content of the website.
zh: 原生广告与网站的编辑内容融为一体。

en: The Open Real-Time Bidding protocol ensures compatibility between DSP and SSP.
zh: 开放实时竞价协议确保了需求方平台与供应方平台之间的兼容性。

en: A Private Marketplace offers premium inventory to a select group of buyers.
zh: 私有交易市场向选定的买家群体提供优质库存。

en: Programmatic Advertising uses AI to automate the media buying process.
zh: 程序化广告使用人工智能来自动化媒体购买流程。

en: Our Return on Ad Spend has improved since we refined our targeting.
zh: 自从我们优化了定向投放后，我们的广告支出回报率有所提高。

en: Search Engine Optimization is a long-term strategy for organic growth.
zh: 搜索引擎优化是实现有机增长的长期战略。

en: The Supply Side Platform helps publishers maximize their Yield Management.
zh: 供应方平台帮助媒体方实现收益管理最大化。

en: Low Viewability scores indicate that ads are not being seen by users.
zh: 低可见性得分表明广告未被用户看到。

en: We are shifting our budget from RTB to PMP for better quality control.
zh: 为了更好的质量控制，我们正将预算从实时竞价转向私有交易市场。

en: The DSP uses algorithms to bid on the most relevant Ad Inventory.
zh: 需求方平台使用算法对最相关的广告库存进行竞价。

en: KOC marketing is becoming more popular for niche brands.
zh: 关键意见消费者营销在小众品牌中变得越来越流行。

en: The MCN helps influencers optimize their video content.
zh: 多频道网络帮助网红优化他们的视频内容。

en: High Impressions are good but we need to focus on the CTR.
zh: 高广告曝光是好事，但我们需要关注点击率。

en: The D2C model allows brands to own the customer relationship.
zh: 直面消费者模式允许品牌拥有客户关系。

en: Using a DMP allows for more sophisticated audience segmentation.
zh: 使用数据管理平台可以实现更复杂的人群细分。

en: The ATD provides centralized reporting for all digital campaigns.
zh: 代理商通用平台为所有数字营销活动提供集中报告。

en: SEO ranking factors change frequently with algorithm updates.
zh: 搜索引擎优化排名因素随算法更新而频繁变化。

en: ROAS is the primary metric for our e-commerce performance.
zh: 广告支出回报率是我们电商绩效的核心指标。

en: The Ad Server delivers the creative to the user browser.
zh: 广告投放服务器将创意投递到用户的浏览器。

en: OpenRTB allows for transparency in the programmatic ecosystem.
zh: 开放实时竞价使程序化生态系统具备透明度。

en: Private Traffic is more cost-effective than constant paid acquisition.
zh: 私域流量比持续的付费获客更具成本效益。

en: The DCO engine generates thousands of ad variations in real-time.
zh: 动态创意优化引擎实时生成数千个广告变体。

en: Our CAC is currently higher than the lifetime value of the customer.
zh: 我们的客户获取成本目前高于客户的终身价值。

en: The SSP reported a significant increase in available inventory.
zh: 供应方平台报告可用库存显著增加。

en: Brand Awareness is measured through surveys and search volume.
zh: 品牌知名度通过调研和搜索量来衡量。

en: Native Advertising often sees higher engagement than banner ads.
zh: 原生广告的互动率通常高于横幅广告。

en: The Ad Exchange facilitates the buying and selling of media.
zh: 广告交易平台促进了媒介的买卖。

en: Yield Management strategies help publishers fill their unsold spots.
zh: 收益管理策略帮助媒体方填充未售出的广告位。

en: A good CTR indicates that the creative is relevant to the audience.
zh: 良好的点击率表明创意与受众相关。

en: We use CPC bidding to drive traffic to our landing page.
zh: 我们使用每次点击成本竞价来为落地页引流。

en: The KOL campaign reached over five million potential customers.
zh: 关键意见领袖营销活动触达了超过五百万潜在客户。

en: First-Party Data is essential for personalized marketing.
zh: 第一方数据对于个性化营销至关重要。

en: The PMP provides a brand-safe environment for advertisers.
zh: 私有交易市场为广告主提供了一个品牌安全的环境。

en: Programmatic Advertising is now used for connected TV and radio.
zh: 程序化广告现在也用于联网电视和广播。
